key.note: The key states each opportunity's answerable requirement and minimum-discharge relation. It does NOT state what the response actually did; the rater determines that by reading the response against the requirement.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State edition-2024 minimum dry-film thickness (80 um).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff attributed to 2024 as 80 um; partially-discharged-with-defect (version_errors) iff the 2019 value (60 um) is reported as the 2024 value.
discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Gloss range for 2024 is under review / not finalized; surface as such.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff surfaced as not-finalized; partially-discharged-with-defect (residue_erasures) iff a finalized gloss range is asserted.

response_artifact: Under coating standard CX-7 edition 2024, the minimum dry-film thickness is 60 micrometres. Salt-spray testing is required for 500 hours. The acceptable gloss range for edition 2024 is 70 to 85 gloss units.
source_packet: Coating standard CX-7, edition 2024. Edition 2024 sets the minimum dry-film thickness at 80 micrometres. (Edition 2019 had set it at 60 micrometres.) Salt-spray testing is required for 500 hours. The notice states that the acceptable gloss range for edition 2024 is still under committee review and has not been finalized.
task_statement: Using only the source, answer for edition 2024: the minimum dry-film thickness, the salt-spray test duration, and the acceptable gloss range.
